action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline 0.5228 test balanced accuracy with big domain gap (val was 0.69). Weak on bobcat, squirrel, empty, bird. Analysis: Need stronger domain generalization - more augmentation, longer training, TTA, focal loss. Decision: Train 20 epochs with improvements, add TTA to predict.py.
